class.help: Registra los datos de los reclutados, ya sean internos o externos.
class.label: Reclutado
class.name: RECLUTADO

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_reclutado as oi_reclutado, t0.c_reclutado as c_reclutado, t0.d_reclutado as d_reclutado, t0.c_estado as c_estado, t0.f_reclutamiento as f_reclutamiento, t0.f_seleccion as f_seleccion, t0.f_contratacion as f_contratacion, t0.f_rankeo as f_rankeo, t0.f_descartado as f_descartado, t0.n_ranking as n_ranking, SEC.policy, t0.c_reclutado as CODE, t0.d_reclutado as TEXT, t0.oi_referencia as oi_referencia, t0.oi_personal_emp as oi_personal_emp, t0.oi_postulante as oi_postulante FROM SEL13_RECLUTADOS as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Gestion_de_Postulantes.Reclutados.RECLUTADO\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_reclutado LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_reclutado asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: FIND-REC-DESCR
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT t1.c_postulante as CODE, t1.d_postulante as TEXT FROM SEL13_RECLUTADOS as t0, SEL01_POSTULANTE as t1 JOIN t0.oi_postulante INNER t1.oi_postulante WHERE t0.oi_reclutado = {#PARAM:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_reclutado as oi_reclutado, SEC.policy FROM SEL13_RECLUTADOS as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Gestion_de_Postulantes.Reclutados.RECLUTADO\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_reclutado LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_reclutado asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: FIND-REC-DESCR
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT t1.c_postulante as CODE, t1.d_postulante as TEXT FROM SEL13_RECLUTADOS as t0, SEL01_POSTULANTE as t1 JOIN t0.oi_postulante INNER t1.oi_postulante WHERE t0.oi_reclutado = {#PARAM:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: FIND-REC-DESCR
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT t1.c_postulante as CODE, t1.d_postulante as TEXT FROM SEL13_RECLUTADOS as t0, SEL01_POSTULANTE as t1 JOIN t0.oi_postulante INNER t1.oi_postulante WHERE t0.oi_reclutado = {#PARAM:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: FIND-REC-DESCR-LEGAJO
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT t1.e_numero_legajo as CODE, t2.d_ape_y_nom as DESC FROM SEL13_RECLUTADOS as t0, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP as t1, PER01_PERSONAL as t2 JOIN t0.oi_personal_emp INNER t1.oi_personal_emp, t1.oi_personal INNER t2.oi_personal WHERE t0.oi_reclutado = {#PARAM:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW

assosiation.description: Registra las cartas enviadas por la empresa para el Reclutado.
assosiation.label: Cartas Enviadas
assosiation.name: CARTAS_ENV

assosiation.description: Registra los examenes realizados o a realizar para un reclutado en una referencia dada, junto con su resultado.
assosiation.label: Examenes por Reclutado
assosiation.name: EXA_REC

assosiation.description: Registra las ofertas realizadas por parte de la empresa al reclutado.
assosiation.label: Ofertas
assosiation.name: OFERTAS

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Gestion_de_Postulantes.Reclutados.RECLUTADO.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Gestion_de_Postulantes.Reclutados.RECLUTADO.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(SEL13_RECLUTADOS.oi_reclutado) as CNT from SEL13_RECLUTADOS Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and SEL13_RECLUTADOS.oi_reclutado={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(SEL13_RECLUTADOS.d_reclutado,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(SEL13_RECLUTADOS.c_reclutado,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and SEL13_RECLUTADOS.oi_referencia={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

resource.name: ListarIds
resource.description: Devuelve todos los IDs de los reclutados segun una opcion.

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT SEL13_RECLUTADOS.oi_reclutado FROM SEL13_RECLUTADOS WHERE SEL13_RECLUTADOS.oi_referencia = {#SOURCE:@oi_referencia} AND SEL13_RECLUTADOS.c_estado = \'R\' ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT SEL13_RECLUTADOS.oi_reclutado FROM SEL13_RECLUTADOS WHERE SEL13_RECLUTADOS.oi_referencia = {#SOURCE:@oi_referencia} AND SEL13_RECLUTADOS.c_estado = \'R\' ')/ROWS/ROW

resource.description: cuenta la cantidad de contratados que hay para una referencia
resource.name: CantidadContratados

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT COUNT(SEL13_RECLUTADOS.oi_reclutado) AS cant FROM SEL13_RECLUTADOS WHERE SEL13_RECLUTADOS.c_estado = \'C\' AND SEL13_RECLUTADOS.oi_referencia = {%= #SOURCE:@id %} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT SEL02_REF_RES_EXA.l_apto_prox_examen FROM SEL02_REF_RES_EXA WHERE SEL02_REF_RES_EXA.oi_ref_res_exa = {#SOURCE:@oi_ref_res_exa} ')/ROWS/ROW

resource.description: lista todos los reclutados de una referencia por el estado que ingresa
resource.name: ListarIdsPorEstado

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT SEL13_RECLUTADOS.oi_reclutado FROM SEL13_RECLUTADOS WHERE SEL13_RECLUTADOS.oi_referencia = {%= #SOURCE:@oi_referencia%} AND SEL13_RECLUTADOS.c_estado = {#SOURCE:@estado} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT SEL02_REQ.oi_req FROM SEL02_REQ , SEL02_REFERENCIAS , SEL02_REF_POST JOIN SEL02_REQ.oi_req INNER SEL02_REFERENCIAS.oi_req , SEL02_REFERENCIAS.oi_referencia INNER SEL02_REF_POST.oi_referencia WHERE SEL02_REF_POST.oi_postulante = {#SOURCE:@oi_postulante} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT SEL02_REQ.oi_req FROM SEL02_REQ , SEL02_REFERENCIAS , SEL02_REF_PER JOIN SEL02_REQ.oi_req INNER SEL02_REFERENCIAS.oi_req , SEL02_REFERENCIAS.oi_referencia INNER SEL02_REF_PER.oi_referencia WHERE SEL02_REF_PER.oi_personal_emp = {#SOURCE:@oi_personal_emp} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal FROM PER01_PERSONAL , SEL01_POSTULANTE JOIN PER01_PERSONAL.c_nro_cuil INNER SEL01_POSTULANTE.c_nro_cuil WHERE SEL01_POSTULANTE.oi_postulante = {#SOURCE:@oi_postulante} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT SEL02_REF_COM_EXA.oi_competencia FROM SEL02_REF_COM_EXA WHERE SEL02_REF_COM_EXA.oi_ref_examen = {#SOURCE:@oi_ref_examen} ')/ROWS/ROW

class.help: Registra las cartas enviadas por la empresa para el Reclutado.
class.label: Carta Enviadas
class.name: CARTA_ENV

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #PARAM:

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Gestion_de_Postulantes.Reclutados.CARTA_ENV.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Gestion_de_Postulantes.Reclutados.CARTA_ENV.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(SEL13_CARTAS_ENV.oi_carta_env) as CNT from SEL13_CARTAS_ENV Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and SEL13_CARTAS_ENV.oi_carta_env={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(SEL13_CARTAS_ENV.oi_carta_env,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(SEL13_CARTAS_ENV.oi_carta_env,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and SEL13_CARTAS_ENV.oi_reclutado={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

class.help: Registra los examenes realizados o a realizar para un reclutado en una referencia dada, junto con su resultado.
class.label: Examen por Reclutado
class.name: EXA_REC

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #PARAM:

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Gestion_de_Postulantes.Reclutados.EXA_REC.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Gestion_de_Postulantes.Reclutados.EXA_REC.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(SEL13_EXA_REC.oi_exa_rec) as CNT from SEL13_EXA_REC Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and SEL13_EXA_REC.oi_exa_rec={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(SEL13_EXA_REC.oi_exa_rec,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(SEL13_EXA_REC.oi_exa_rec,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and SEL13_EXA_REC.oi_reclutado={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Gestion_de_Postulantes.Reclutados.EXA_REC.QUERY
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' {%? (#SOURCE:@START='') {% %} {% fromrow {%=#SOURCE:@START %} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@LEN='') {% %} {% maxsize {%=#SOURCE:@LEN %} %} %} select SEL13_EXA_REC.oi_exa_rec as ID, SEL07_EXAMENES.c_examen as COD, SEL07_EXAMENES.d_examen as DES, SEL13_EXA_REC.oi_reclutado as PARENT from SEL13_EXA_REC, SEL02_REF_EXAMEN, SEL07_EXAMENES join SEL13_EXA_REC.oi_ref_examen INNER SEL02_REF_EXAMEN.oi_ref_examen, SEL02_REF_EXAMEN.oi_examen INNER SEL07_EXAMENES.oi_examen Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and ID={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(DES,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(COD,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and PARENT={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@ORDERBY='') {% order by DES asc %} {% order by {%=#SOURCE:@ORDERBY %} asc %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Gestion_de_Postulantes.Reclutados.EXA_REC.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(SEL13_EXA_REC.oi_exa_rec) as CNT from SEL13_EXA_REC Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and SEL13_EXA_REC.oi_exa_rec={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(SEL13_EXA_REC.oi_exa_rec,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(SEL13_EXA_REC.oi_exa_rec,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and SEL13_EXA_REC.oi_reclutado={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

class.help: Registra las ofertas realizadas por parte de la empresa al reclutado.
class.label: Oferta
class.name: OFERTA

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #PARAM:

assosiation.description: Registra los distintos beneficios de las ofertas.
assosiation.label: Beneficios de las Ofertas
assosiation.name: BENEF_OFERTA

assosiation.description: Registra los Motivos de Rechazos por ofertas.
assosiation.label: Motivos de Rechazos por Oferta
assosiation.name: MOT_REC_OF

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Gestion_de_Postulantes.Reclutados.OFERTA.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Gestion_de_Postulantes.Reclutados.OFERTA.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(SEL13_OFERTAS.oi_oferta) as CNT from SEL13_OFERTAS Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and SEL13_OFERTAS.oi_oferta={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(SEL13_OFERTAS.oi_oferta,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(SEL13_OFERTAS.oi_oferta,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and SEL13_OFERTAS.oi_reclutado={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

NucleusRH.Base.Gestion_de_Postulantes.Reclutados.BENEF_OFERTA.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(SEL13_BENEF_OFERTA.oi_benef_oferta) as CNT from SEL13_BENEF_OFERTA Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and SEL13_BENEF_OFERTA.oi_oferta={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

class.help: Registra los Motivos de Rechazos por ofertas.
class.label: Motivo Rechazo Oferta
class.name: MOT_REC_OF

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #PARAM:

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Gestion_de_Postulantes.Reclutados.MOT_REC_OF.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Gestion_de_Postulantes.Reclutados.MOT_REC_OF.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(SEL13_MOT_REC_OF.oi_mot_rec_of) as CNT from SEL13_MOT_REC_OF Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and SEL13_MOT_REC_OF.oi_mot_rec_of={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(SEL13_MOT_REC_OF.oi_mot_rec_of,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(SEL13_MOT_REC_OF.oi_mot_rec_of,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and SEL13_MOT_REC_OF.oi_oferta={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #PARAM:

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Gestion_de_Postulantes.Reclutados.ENTREV_REC.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Gestion_de_Postulantes.Reclutados.ENTREV_REC.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(SEL13_ENTREV_REC.oi_entrev_rec) as CNT from SEL13_ENTREV_REC Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and SEL13_ENTREV_REC.oi_entrev_rec={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(SEL13_ENTREV_REC.f_fecha_hora_ent,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(SEL13_ENTREV_REC.oi_entrev_rec,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and SEL13_ENTREV_REC.oi_reclutado={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW
